source.description: Amazon S3 URI identifying the data file(s), folder, or multiple folders to load. Supported URI formats: s3://bucket_name/key, https://s3.amazonaws.com/bucket_name/key, https://s3.region.amazonaws.com/bucket_name/key.

format.description: The data format of the source files.

iamRoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that provides Neptune access to the S3 bucket. Can be a comma-separated list for cross-account access.

region.description: The AWS Region of the S3 bucket. Must match the Neptune cluster region or be accessible cross-region.

mode.description: The load mode. NEW fails if data was previously loaded. RESUME continues a failed load. AUTO resumes or starts new as needed.

failOnError.description: Whether to stop the entire load job on error.

parallelism.description: The degree of parallelism for loading. LOW uses a single thread, MEDIUM uses num_vCPU/2, HIGH uses num_vCPU, OVERSUBSCRIBE uses all available resources.

parserConfiguration.description: Optional parser configuration settings for RDF data.

baseUri.description: The base URI for relative URIs in the data.

namedGraphUri.description: The default named graph URI for loaded triples.

allowEmptyStrings.description: Whether to allow empty string property values.

updateSingleCardinalityProperties.description: Whether to update existing single-cardinality vertex properties. Not supported for openCypher format.

queueRequest.description: Whether to queue the request if a load is already running. Neptune queues up to 64 jobs in FIFO order.

dependencies.description: Array of load job IDs that must complete successfully before this job runs.

userProvidedEdgeIds.description: For openCypher format only. TRUE requires an :ID column in edge files. FALSE auto-generates edge IDs.
